title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murder of teenage girl
description: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
content:
US singer D4vd has been arrested on suspicion of murdering a teenage girl who went missing last year, police say.

content:

title: Christine Baranski and Richard E Grant to star in Noel Coward's Hay Fever in London's West End
description: The US actress will star opposite Richard E Grant in a new production of Noel Coward's comedy Hay Fever.
content:
US actress Christine Baranski has said it will be a "dream come true" to make her West End debut later this year, in a new production of Noel Coward's comedy Hay Fever.

title: Aston Villa: How Unai Emery turned spectacular European nights into Villa's new normal
description: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.
content:
They say a week is a long time in football - never mind an entire decade.
